name: bilibili-favorites-planner
description: Read-only crawler and local planner for reviewed Bilibili favorites reorganization task packages.

scripts.validate:examples: node scripts/validate-crawler-output.mjs examples/evidence.example.jsonl && node scripts/validate-classification-review.mjs examples/classification-review.example.jsonl && node scripts/validate-task-package.mjs examples/task-package.example.json

author: zhangrui
